channel.title: motophie TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from motophie

item.title: day made 😩 . . . . #Motorcycle #motorcyclegear #motogirl #shortriders #motorcycles #motorcyclesoftiktok #bikersoftiktok #bikersoftiktok🏍♥️ #motorcyclegirl #motolife #motorbike #motorbiker #motorcyclejourneys

item.title: Replying to @BigBoi won’t let me stitch a photo but I can do the second part 🥹🥹

item.title: @cfmoto_officialCFMOTO 450SR-S Aspar Edition height: 152cm / 4ft10 inseam: 61cm / 24" (crotch to ankle) shoes: nike air force 1 platform sitting on hubby's new baby 🫣 was too nervous to turn the wheel straight but curious to test my reach... needless to s
item.description: @cfmoto_officialCFMOTO 450SR-S Aspar Edition height: 152cm / 4ft10 inseam: 61cm / 24" (crotch to ankle) shoes: nike air force 1 platform sitting on hubby's new baby 🫣 was too nervous to turn the wheel straight but curious to test my reach... needless to s
item.author: motophie

item.title: 10/10 panic 🤣 gorgeous view at melbourne airport lookout but im not sure it's very bike friendly i saw on goog reviews that they installed some more lights and 'repaved' the road now I realise they just filled the pot holes + rest of the road with gravel
item.description: 10/10 panic 🤣 gorgeous view at melbourne airport lookout but im not sure it's very bike friendly i saw on goog reviews that they installed some more lights and 'repaved' the road now I realise they just filled the pot holes + rest of the road with gravel
item.author: motophie

item.title: and locktite anything that shouldn’t move 🫡 ofc check torque spec for important bits and bobs - I’m just checking for anything obviously loose here sorry I’ve been a bit mia! life has been absolutely relentless recently and im very deflated 🫠 but should b
item.description: and locktite anything that shouldn’t move 🫡 ofc check torque spec for important bits and bobs - I’m just checking for anything obviously loose here sorry I’ve been a bit mia! life has been absolutely relentless recently and im very deflated 🫠 but should b
item.author: motophie

item.title: quick before and after of my stock exhaust and new slip on from AliExpress 🤣 what i thought would take me 15 min ended up taking 5 hours... taking off the stock exhaust was a nightmare 💀 i filmed it thinking it'd be a cool tutorial but i'll sort through
item.description: quick before and after of my stock exhaust and new slip on from AliExpress 🤣 what i thought would take me 15 min ended up taking 5 hours... taking off the stock exhaust was a nightmare 💀 i filmed it thinking it'd be a cool tutorial but i'll sort through
item.author: motophie

item.title: I like how he at first refuses, but then complies so easily 🤣🤣 This has been stuck in my head ALL WEEK . . . . . #Motorcycle #motorcyclegear #motogirl #learningtoride #motorcyclebeginner #motorcyclebeginners #shortriders #motorcycles #motorcyclesoftiktok

item.title: coming to the Keilor store always feels nostalgic because it was the gateway to motolife for me as a beginner 💕 I walked in for the first time one day and something changed in my brain 😅 little did I know that I would come back time and time again, whethe
item.description: coming to the Keilor store always feels nostalgic because it was the gateway to motolife for me as a beginner 💕 I walked in for the first time one day and something changed in my brain 😅 little did I know that I would come back time and time again, whethe

item.title: ✨smart biker girlies read their owners manual✨ genuinely the most helpful tool for your bike especially if you’re new to riding, I promise you 💕 If your bike didn’t come with one, you can download or purchase copies online! What petrol does it need? Owne
item.description: ✨smart biker girlies read their owners manual✨ genuinely the most helpful tool for your bike especially if you’re new to riding, I promise you 💕 If your bike didn’t come with one, you can download or purchase copies online! What petrol does it need? Owne
item.author: motophie

item.title: If you’re feeling this way, know that you’re 100% not alone. Whenever I take unintentional breaks, whether that’s because life gets busy or the rain hasn’t let up, I fall into this cycle. I hope this post helps :) let me know if you’ve been feeling this w
item.description: If you’re feeling this way, know that you’re 100% not alone. Whenever I take unintentional breaks, whether that’s because life gets busy or the rain hasn’t let up, I fall into this cycle. I hope this post helps :) let me know if you’ve been feeling this w
item.author: motophie

item.title: I love that these gloves are a result of a company listening to the feedback of their users, taking it on board and bringing to fruition something that not only represents all the suggestions, but also looks damn cool 😎 The @SA1NT CC road glove 2.0 has e
item.description: I love that these gloves are a result of a company listening to the feedback of their users, taking it on board and bringing to fruition something that not only represents all the suggestions, but also looks damn cool 😎 The @SA1NT CC road glove 2.0 has e
item.author: motophie

item.title: Replying to @Monica has been a really reliable extra layer on top of my gear especially in winter 🥰 I love wearing it casually too! #temufinds
item.description: Replying to @Monica has been a really reliable extra layer on top of my gear especially in winter 🥰 I love wearing it casually too! #temufinds
item.author: motophie

item.title: Replying to @Steffen_wenhao I’m located in Australia, we generally fuel before paying ⛽️ Don’t ask me why, I don’t mind paying first if it means I can keep my helmet on 🤷🏻‍♀️ Even better if I can just pay at the machine and not have to walk in to queue a
item.description: Replying to @Steffen_wenhao I’m located in Australia, we generally fuel before paying ⛽️ Don’t ask me why, I don’t mind paying first if it means I can keep my helmet on 🤷🏻‍♀️ Even better if I can just pay at the machine and not have to walk in to queue a
item.author: motophie

item.title: still in my noob era 🤡 hope this helps at least one person feel better about their riding esp if you're new (╥ᆺ╥；) ₍₍৻( •̀ ᗜ •́ ৻) as always, ride safe 💖 · · ─ ·✶· ─ · · ♡ cardo code: motophie ⟡ saint code: motophie . . . . . . #Motorcycle #motorcycleg

item.title: a type A girl’s guide on what to prepare 🤪 it goes without saying, please do your own due diligence, take what you want from this and leave what doesn’t make sense to you 🩵 . . . #motorcycle #motorcycles #marketplace #usedbikes #australia
item.description: a type A girl’s guide on what to prepare 🤪 it goes without saying, please do your own due diligence, take what you want from this and leave what doesn’t make sense to you 🩵 . . . #motorcycle #motorcycles #marketplace #usedbikes #australia
item.author: motophie

item.title: an unforgettable weekend at ASBK 🇦🇺😭 can confirm that this altered my brain chemistry 🧠 so much respect for all the riders this weekend, what a joy to experience in person 🫶 the amount of skill and focus that goes into racing is incredible, let alone all
item.description: an unforgettable weekend at ASBK 🇦🇺😭 can confirm that this altered my brain chemistry 🧠 so much respect for all the riders this weekend, what a joy to experience in person 🫶 the amount of skill and focus that goes into racing is incredible, let alone all
item.author: motophie

item.title: some of my favourite accessories as a newer rider that helped me feel safer on the road 🏍️✨ - Frame sliders • Oggy Knobs from Bikebiz - Helmet Light • by Brake Free from Fender Eliminator - Sun Reactive Pinlock • from EasyR - Bluetooth Headset • Cardo P
item.description: some of my favourite accessories as a newer rider that helped me feel safer on the road 🏍️✨ - Frame sliders • Oggy Knobs from Bikebiz - Helmet Light • by Brake Free from Fender Eliminator - Sun Reactive Pinlock • from EasyR - Bluetooth Headset • Cardo P
item.author: motophie
